title: Document the local issue check command
acceptanceCriteria: README names the command to run the local issue check
README explains that the command reads data/issue-events.jsonl and writes receipts/loop-check-latest.json
No product behavior or Lakebed code changes are included
summary: Ready because this is a small documentation change for the command that already exists and stays inside the local loop boundary.

title: Let the loop change product files after a ready classification
acceptanceCriteria: The allowed file boundary is expanded beyond local issue/check/receipt files
A human approves which product files the loop may change
A receipt format records any product file changes
summary: Needs human approval because changing product files is outside the first-loop boundary in VISION.md.

title: Connect the local issue loop to GitHub issues
summary: Needs more input because the repository, auth model, issue mapping, write permissions, and failure behavior are not defined yet, and external trackers are out of scope for the first loop.
